race.comment: BEARBRASSBLACKFISH (3) finished a close fourth in a hot form race two back at Kyneton over 1864m. Stepped up to 2000m at Kilmore last time and struggled. Has been to the jump-outs since. Not much depth to this race so he looks a big chance to return to form. PRESERVATOR (2) has been easily accounted for in two runs this prep, both in sprint races at Sale. On a seven-day back-up and generally hits form at this time of the campaign so watch for a much better run. TIGHT GRIP (5) looks ready to find form at the third run back from a spell. Two runs this time in work have been in better company and he hasn't been all that far away. Live chance in this company. MOOSE JAW (13) is cherry ripe and needs this sort of trip after four runs back from a spell.
